description: Design-level upgrade and migration patterns and anti-patterns

entries.title: Unsafe Upgrade Patterns
entries.summary: Proxy upgrades without addressing storage layout, in-flight state, or initialization replay

indicators: Upgradeable via proxy with no storage layout constraints
No migration procedure for state changes between versions
design_context.description: The design specifies proxy upgrades without addressing storage layout compatibility, in-flight state corruption, or initialization replay.

entries.title: No Versioning Strategy
entries.summary: No specification for version coexistence during migration

indicators: Upgrade described without version transition plan
No specification for how existing positions handle upgrade
External integrations not addressed during version migration
design_context.description: The design doesn't specify how different versions of the protocol coexist during migration periods. Old and new contracts may interact in undefined ways.
